positive: Minimalist retro-futurism design of a stylized crescent moon above a grouping of geometric, crystalline planets in a celestial void. The aesthetic is inspired by 1970s sci-fi album covers and mid-century modern illustration, rendered in thick, bold line work with flat, saturated color blocks (deep indigo, mustard yellow, burnt orange, and cream). Emphasize strong negative space and clean, crisp silhouettes. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centrally arranged, suitable for a high-contrast apparel print. Vector illustration style, graphic art, poster design, screen print texture, high detail.
